text: 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 ⚡ WSJ: 15 American warships are stationed in the region to support the naval blockade against Iran.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 ⚡ WSJ：15艘美国军舰驻扎在该地区，以支持针对伊朗的海上封锁。

text: 🇮🇱 ⚡️ Belarus-Born Roman Goffman Approved as New Mossad Chief The occupation regime has appointed Roman Goffman as the new head of Mossad. Chosen by War Criminal Netanyahu, the move faces backlash as Goffman reportedly lacks intelligence credentials and is seen as another loyalist pick over competence. Even Zionist media resurfaced footage from October 7 showing him retreating under fire near Sderot before being wounded. From battlefield failure to spy chief, only in the Zionist regime.
text_zh: 🇮🇱 ⚡️ 白俄罗斯出生的罗曼·戈夫曼被批准为摩萨德新任局长。占领政权已任命罗曼·戈夫曼为摩萨德新任负责人。此举由战争罪犯内塔尼亚胡选定，但遭到强烈反对，因为据报道戈夫曼缺乏情报资历，被视为又一个重用亲信而非贤能的例子。甚至连犹太复国主义媒体都重新发布了10月7日的视频，显示他在斯代罗特附近遭到炮火袭击时撤退，随后受伤。从战场失败者到间谍头目，这只可能发生在犹太复国主义政权中。

text: OSINTdefender According to the Israel Defense Force (IDF), two IDF soldiers were moderately injured, with another 6 being lightly injured, following a Lebanese Hezbollah bomb-laden drone attack during IDF operations in southern Lebanon. The soldiers were transported to the hospital and their families have been notified, per reports. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 据以色列国防军（IDF）称，在以色列国防军于黎巴嫩南部行动期间，黎巴嫩真主党发动了载有炸弹的无人机袭击，导致两名以色列国防军士兵中度受伤，另有6人轻伤。据报道，士兵已被送往医院，其家属已收到通知。推文

text: Open Source Intel Since midnight last night, Hezbollah has launched 30 separate rocket and drone attacks against civilian targets in Northern Israel, each attack consists of multiple rockets. From airstrikes and artillery to interceptions and strikes on Hezbollah infrastructure, to non stop jet activity, it’s been very noisy where I live. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 自昨晚午夜以来，真主党已对以色列北部的平民目标发动了30次独立的火箭弹和无人机袭击，每次袭击都包含多枚火箭弹。从空袭和炮击到拦截和打击真主党基础设施，再到不停歇的喷气式飞机活动，我住的地方非常吵闹。推文

text: OSINTdefender U.S. President Donald J. Trump said on his Truth Social app that if any Iranian fast-attack vessels approach the now in effect U.S. blockade they will be “immediately eliminated” in the same manner that vessels operated by designated terrorist organizations in the Southern Command area of responsibility are. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 美国总统唐纳德·J·特朗普在他的“真实社交”（Truth Social）应用上表示，如果任何伊朗快速攻击艇接近现已生效的美国封锁线，它们将被“立即消灭”，方式与南方司令部责任区内由指定恐怖组织操作的船只所受待遇相同。推文

text: OSINTdefender RT @sentdefender : After attacking the Head of the Catholic Church, Pope Leo XIV, in a rambling post earlier tonight for his criticisms of the ongoing conflict in the Middle East, President Trump posted this AI image to TruthSocial, portraying himself as Jesus Christ. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2043561732166070591/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 转推 @sentdefender：在今晚早些时候的一篇长篇大论中抨击天主教会领袖教皇利奥十四世对中东持续冲突的批评后，特朗普总统在“真实社交”上发布了这张人工智能生成的图片，将自己描绘成耶稣基督。https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2043561732166070591/photo/1 推文

text: Visioner 🇨🇳 🇮🇷 China's Ministry of Foreign Affairs denies the reports claiming that it is sending or planning to send weapons to Iran: China has always taken a cautious and responsible attitude in terms of military exports. We oppose groundless smears or malicious associations without any factual basis. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇨🇳 🇮🇷 中国外交部否认有关其正在或计划向伊朗运送武器的报道：中国在军事出口方面一贯采取审慎和负责任的态度。我们反对任何毫无事实根据的无端抹黑或恶意联想。推文

text: Visioner 🇮🇷 🇷🇺 Two Russian Mi-28 helicopters, acquired by Iran just before the war, are seen above Tehran https://twitter.com/visionergeo/status/2043705103480152168/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇮🇷 🇷🇺 两架俄罗斯米-28直升机（伊朗在战争前夕购得）出现在德黑兰上空 https://twitter.com/visionergeo/status/2043705103480152168/video/1 推文

text: WarTranslated Magyar stated that people in Hungary know that Ukraine is the victim of this war. Regarding the €90 billion loan, Magyar supports the agreement reached in December and does not plan to challenge it. He also added that he will not actively seek ties with Russia; however, "if Putin calls me, I will pick up the phone." Nevertheless, Magyar says that in such a case, he would ask Putin to end the war. tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 马扎尔表示，匈牙利人民知道乌克兰是这场战争的受害者。关于900亿欧元的贷款，马扎尔支持12月达成的协议，并不打算挑战它。他还补充说，他不会主动寻求与俄罗斯建立联系；然而，“如果普京给我打电话，我会接听。”尽管如此，马扎尔表示，在这种情况下，他会要求普京结束战争。推文

text: Open Source Intel Péter Magyar, Hungary's election winner: News broadcasts on public state media will be suspended until "we can ensure unbiased coverage." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043704445146484973/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 匈牙利大选获胜者彼得·马扎尔：公共国家媒体的新闻广播将暂停，直到“我们能确保公正的报道”。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043704445146484973/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel NATO allies have refused to join Trump's Strait of Hormuz blockade. Britain and France both declined involvement. Macron is proposing a multinational mission to restore navigation instead. - Reuters https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043704073388482647/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 北约盟国拒绝加入特朗普的霍尔木兹海峡封锁行动。英国和法国均拒绝参与。马克龙提议采取一项多国任务来恢复航行。- 路透社 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043704073388482647/photo/1 推文

text: Visioner 🇸🇦 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 BIG | Israeli Channel 12: A Saudi royal family source said there is no solution to the Iran threat without a U.S. ground invasion and regime change, similar to the 2003 fall of Saddam Hussein. The source stressed that any alternative must be secular and acceptable to the Iranian public, preferably not Crown Prince Reza Pahlavi. Saudi Arabia believes the war has not achieved its results and that Iran has become more aggressive towards the kingdom, Israel and the U.S. However, Riyadh does not see itself as a direct party to the conflict. “If we are exposed to Iranian aggression, each incident will have its own response,” the source said. See the latest updates with us: @visionergeo tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇸🇦 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 重磅 | 以色列第12频道：一位沙特王室消息人士称，如果不进行美国地面入侵和政权更迭（类似于2003年萨达姆·侯赛因倒台），伊朗威胁将无法解决。该消息人士强调，任何替代方案都必须是世俗的，并能被伊朗公众接受，最好不是礼萨·巴列维王储。沙特阿拉伯认为战争尚未达到预期结果，伊朗对沙特、以色列和美国的态度变得更加激进。然而，利雅得并不认为自己是冲突的直接当事方。“如果我们遭受伊朗的侵略，每一事件都将有其相应的回应，”该消息人士说。与我们一起查看最新动态：@visionergeo 推文

text: Open Source Intel Lebanon President Aoun to the Italian Foreign Minister: 'Lebanon hopes that an agreement on a ceasefire will be reached during the anticipated meeting tomorrow' https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043702222903484546/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 黎巴嫩总统奥恩对意大利外交部长表示：“黎巴嫩希望在明天预期的会议上达成停火协议” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043702222903484546/photo/1 推文

text: Faytuks News RT @FaytuksNetwork : Trump posts about the blockade https://twitter.com/FaytuksNetwork/status/2043697488704520586/photo/1 Now: U.S. blockade on Iran has entered into force - Faytuks Network tweet
text_zh: Faytuks News 转推 @FaytuksNetwork：特朗普发布关于封锁的消息 https://twitter.com/FaytuksNetwork/status/2043697488704520586/photo/1 现在：美国对伊朗的封锁已经生效 - Faytuks Network 推文

text: Open Source Intel EU Foreign Policy Chief Kallas: "The EU will continue to reject any arrangement limiting free and safe passage through the straits in accordance with international law." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043701585058861365/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 欧盟外交政策负责人卡拉斯：“欧盟将继续拒绝任何根据国际法限制海峡自由和安全通行的安排。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043701585058861365/photo/1 推文

text: Visioner 🇭🇺 🇺🇦 Péter Madjár stated that he does not intend to block the 90 billion euro aid for Ukraine. According to him, the decision to allocate these funds has already been made at the EU summit in December - without the participation of Hungary, the Czech Republic, and Slovakia, and he sees no reason for this decision to be reconsidered. Madjár also criticized Orbán for inconsistency: initially, he supported this decision, but then opposed it. Meanwhile, Hungary itself will not participate in the loan process - the country is in a difficult financial situation and will focus on unblocking about 17 billion euros of EU funds that were frozen due to the previous government's policies. 📌 Essentially, this means a return to the EU's common line: not blocking aid to Ukraine, but without taking on additional obligations. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇭🇺 🇺🇦 彼得·马扎尔表示，他不打算阻止向乌克兰提供的900亿欧元援助。据他称，分配这些资金的决定已在12月的欧盟峰会上做出——当时匈牙利、捷克和斯洛伐克没有参与，他认为没有理由重新考虑这一决定。马扎尔还批评欧尔班前后不一：起初他支持这一决定，后来又反对。与此同时，匈牙利本身不会参与贷款程序——该国财政状况困难，将专注于解冻因前政府政策而被冻结的约170亿欧元欧盟资金。📌 本质上，这意味着回归欧盟的共同路线：不阻止对乌克兰的援助，但也不承担额外的义务。推文

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇹 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 Lebanese President Joseph Aoun told the visiting Italian foreign minister that Lebanon hopes Tuesday’s meeting between the Lebanese, U.S., and Israeli ambassadors in Washington will lead to a ceasefire and open the door to direct talks. He said a solution is possible, but not with one side only; Israel must respond to calls from Lebanon, Arab states, and the international community to stop attacks and begin negotiations. Aoun stressed that negotiations with Israel are the sole responsibility of the Lebanese state, with no other party involved. He also said Lebanon has taken security measures at Rafic Hariri airport and other border crossings, both by sea and on land, to prevent the smuggling of arms or money, and that the army and security forces are working to prevent breaches of the country’s security and economic order. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇹 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩告诉到访的意大利外交部长，黎巴嫩希望周二在华盛顿举行的黎巴嫩、美国和以色列大使会议能促成停火，并为直接对话打开大门。他说解决方案是可能的，但不能仅靠一方；以色列必须响应黎巴嫩、阿拉伯国家和国际社会的呼吁，停止袭击并开始谈判。奥恩强调，与以色列的谈判是黎巴嫩国家的唯一责任，不涉及任何其他方。他还表示，黎巴嫩已在拉菲克·哈里里机场和其他海陆边境口岸采取了安全措施，以防止武器或资金走私，军队和安全部队正在努力防止破坏国家安全和经济秩序的行为。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 A Hezbollah FPV drone targeted a house in Kiryat Shmona around 5:00pm, without any siren sounding. The homeowner extinguished the burning drone using a garden hose. No injuries were reported. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 下午5点左右，一架真主党FPV无人机瞄准了基里亚特什莫纳的一所房屋，没有拉响任何警报。房主用花园软管扑灭了燃烧的无人机。没有人员伤亡报告。@wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 🇻🇦 ⚡ 🇺🇸 The Iranian President Pezeshkian condemned Trump's insult to the Pope.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇻🇦 ⚡ 🇺🇸 伊朗总统佩泽希齐扬谴责了特朗普对教皇的侮辱。

text: 🇱🇧 ⚡ 🇮🇱 The Israeli regime army announced that 8 soldiers of this regime were injured in a Hezbollah drone attack in southern Lebanon.
text_zh: 🇱🇧 ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列政权军队宣布，该政权的8名士兵在黎巴嫩南部的一次真主党无人机袭击中受伤。

text: Situation in south Lebanon's Bint Jbeil continues to deteriorate, with many besieged defenders martyred following an Israeli bombardment and a commitment of several divisions and majority of elite units including Maglan, Egoz and others. The football field where Sayyed Hassan gave his 2006 speech in it is still living rent free in their heads and dedicated a statement about it May God bring peace to all the families of the martyrs and may God bestow patience for the rest May God avenge their blood
text_zh: 黎巴嫩南部宾特朱拜勒的局势持续恶化，在以色列轰炸以及多个师和包括Maglan、Egoz等在内的大多数精锐部队投入战斗后，许多被围困的守军殉难。赛义德·哈桑在2006年发表演讲的足球场仍然占据着他们的脑海，他们甚至为此发表了一份声明。愿上帝给所有烈士家属带来和平，愿上帝赐予其余人耐心，愿上帝为他们的鲜血复仇。

text: 🇩🇪 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 ⚡️ German Chancellor Friedrich Merz: We will continue to feel the consequences of the war in Iran for a long time, even after it is over. We are preparing ourselves for a prolonged period of significant strain on the German economy, and therefore also on private households.
text_zh: 🇩🇪 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 ⚡️ 德国总理弗里德里希·默茨：即使在伊朗战争结束后，我们将长期感受到其后果。我们正在为德国经济以及私人家庭长期承受巨大压力做好准备。

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding near Karmiel, Sakhnin, and other surrounding areas in Northern Israel: • Confrontation Line • Lower Galilee • Upper Galilee @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部卡尔米尔、萨赫宁及周边地区响起红色警报：• 对抗线 • 下加利利 • 上加利利 @wfwitness

text: For the second day in a row, 8 Israeli soldiers were injured when a Hezbullah suicide drone or FPV successfully impacted their gathering in south Lebanon
text_zh: 连续第二天，8名以色列士兵在黎巴嫩南部被真主党的自杀式无人机或FPV成功击中他们的集结地而受伤。

text: More than 10 Hezbullah drones launched from Lebanon at northern Israel and at troops in southern Lebanon since this morning. Rocket fire was also fired at Israeli settlements.
text_zh: 自今天早上以来，从黎巴嫩向以色列北部和黎巴嫩南部的部队发射了超过10架真主党无人机。以色列定居点也遭到了火箭弹袭击。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇱🇺🇸 A senior Hezbollah official, Nawaf al‑Mousawi, said that the group’s agenda for any negotiations with Israel is the liberation of Lebanese land. “Israel will not move from a single grain of soil unless pushed by force,” he stated, adding that…" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah MP Hussein al-Hajj Hassan, touring a site in Beirut's southern suburbs hit by Israeli airstrikes, criticized Lebanese Foreign Minister Youssef Rajji for stating that Lebanon had separated its path from Iran's ahead of Tuesday's negotiations with Israel. "Congratulations! The path of Lebanon with Israel has begun. Find some benefit for Lebanon from this path with the enemy that has killed here and throughout Lebanon," he said. Al-Hajj Hassan vowed that Hezbollah will not give up its principles, resistance, sovereignty, or land. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇱🇺🇸 真主党高级官员纳瓦夫·穆萨维表示，该组织与以色列进行任何谈判的议程都是解放黎巴嫩土地。“除非受到武力推动，否则以色列不会从一粒土上撤走，”他表示，并补充说……” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 真主党议员侯赛因·哈吉·哈桑在参观贝鲁特南郊遭以色列空袭的地点时，批评黎巴嫩外交部长优素福·拉吉声称黎巴嫩在周二与以色列谈判前已将其道路与伊朗分开。“恭喜！黎巴嫩与以色列的道路已经开始。在这个杀害了这里和整个黎巴嫩人民的敌人身上，为黎巴嫩找点好处吧，”他说。哈吉·哈桑发誓，真主党绝不会放弃其原则、抵抗、主权或土地。@wfwitness

text: Russian-purchased Mi-28 combat helicopters reportedly spotted in Iran’s skies. Note: We cannot confirm whether the footage is recent.
text_zh: 据报道，在伊朗天空中发现了俄罗斯购买的米-28战斗直升机。注：我们无法确认该视频是否为近期拍摄。

text: Paris court convicted French cement giant Lafarge (now part of Holcim) of financing terrorism in Syria and violating EU sanctions. Between 2013–2014, Lafarge’s Syrian subsidiary paid about €5.6 million to armed groups — including ISIS — to keep its cement plant operating during the Syrian civil war. The company and eight former executives were found guilty. Former CEO Bruno Lafont received a six-year prison sentence. Lafarge had already pleaded guilty in the U.S. in 2022 and paid $778 million for providing material support to terrorist groups.
text_zh: 巴黎法院判决法国水泥巨头拉法基（现为Holcim的一部分）在叙利亚资助恐怖主义并违反欧盟制裁。2013年至2014年间，拉法基的叙利亚子公司向包括ISIS在内的武装组织支付了约560万欧元，以维持其水泥厂在叙利亚内战期间的运营。该公司和八名前高管被判有罪。前首席执行官布鲁诺·拉丰被判处六年监禁。拉法基已于2022年在美国认罪，并因向恐怖组织提供物质支持而支付了7.78亿美元。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 The Israeli Supreme Court ruled that the IDF must ensure equal opportunities for men and women in assignments to all positions, including combat roles. In addition, the IDF was required to allow women to participate in a trial program in the maneuvering Armored Corps starting this coming November. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 以色列最高法院裁定，以色列国防军必须确保男女在所有职位（包括战斗角色）的分配中享有平等机会。此外，以色列国防军被要求允许女性从今年11月开始参加机动装甲部队的试验计划。@wfwitness

text: 🇺🇦 💥 This morning in Dnepropetrovsk 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇦 💥 今天早上在第聂伯罗彼得罗夫斯克 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Open Source Intel NOW: Iraqis are reporting heavy jet activity reported over Al-Qaim in western Iraq, likely linked to operations supporting enforcement of the blockade. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 现在：伊拉克人报告称伊拉克西部阿尔卡伊姆上空有密集的喷气式飞机活动，这可能与支持执行封锁的行动有关。推文

text: Visioner 🇺🇸 / 🇮🇷 President Trump once again claims the Iranian Navy has been completely destroyed, now claiming 158 ships were sunk, while saying that IRGC speedboats were not sunk because ‘they posed no threat’, warning them that they will be destroyed if they approach the U.S. Naval Blockade tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇺🇸 / 🇮🇷 特朗普总统再次声称伊朗海军已被彻底摧毁，现在声称击沉了158艘船只，同时表示伊斯兰革命卫队的快艇没有被击沉是因为“它们不构成威胁”，并警告它们如果接近美国海军封锁线将被摧毁。推文

text: Disclose.tv JUST IN - Trump warns Iran that if any of their "fast attack ships" approach the blockade they will be "immediately ELIMINATED," as the Iranian port blockade comes into force. https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2043698233734483995/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 快讯 - 特朗普警告伊朗，如果他们的任何“快速攻击舰”接近封锁线，它们将被“立即消灭”，因为对伊朗港口的封锁已经生效。https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2043698233734483995/photo/1 推文

text: ELINT News RT @FaytuksNetwork : Trump posts about the blockade https://twitter.com/FaytuksNetwork/status/2043697488704520586/photo/1 Now: U.S. blockade on Iran has entered into force - Faytuks Network tweet
text_zh: ELINT News 转推 @FaytuksNetwork：特朗普发布关于封锁的消息 https://twitter.com/FaytuksNetwork/status/2043697488704520586/photo/1 现在：美国对伊朗的封锁已经生效 - Faytuks Network 推文

text: Open Source Intel Trump: 'Iran’s Navy is laying at the bottom of the sea, completely obliterated - 158 ships. What we have not hit are their small number of, what they call, “fast attack ships,” because we did not consider them much of a threat. Warning: If any of these ships come anywhere close to our BLOCKADE, they will be immediately ELIMINATED, using the same system of kill that we use against the drug dealers on boats at Sea. It is quick and brutal. P.S. 98.2% of Drugs coming into the U.S. by Ocean or Sea have STOPPED! Thank you for your attention to this matter. President DJT' NEW 🔴 TRUMP: IF ANY OF IRANIAN SHIPS COME ANYWHERE CLOSE TO OUR BLOCKADE, THEY WILL BE IMMEDIATELY ELIMINATED - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 特朗普：“伊朗海军正躺在海底，彻底覆灭——158艘船。我们没有打击的是他们为数不多的所谓‘快速攻击舰’，因为我们认为它们构不成太大威胁。警告：如果这些船只中的任何一艘胆敢靠近我们的封锁线，它们将被立即消灭，使用我们打击海上毒贩船只的同一套杀戮系统。它既迅速又残酷。附：通过海洋或海路进入美国的毒品有98.2%已经停止！感谢您对此事的关注。总统 DJT” 新消息 🔴 特朗普：如果任何伊朗船只胆敢靠近我们的封锁线，它们将被立即消灭 - Open Source Intel 推文

text: OSINTtechnical Hungarian PM-elect Magyar says that the outgoing leadership at the Foreign Ministry is actively shredding sanctions-related documents. tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 匈牙利候任总理马扎尔表示，外交部即将离任的领导层正在积极销毁与制裁相关的文件。推文

text: Prof. John Mearsheimer on Trump's Hormuz blockade: It’s not only ineffective — it’s counterproductive. The idea that Iran will simply throw up its hands and surrender is not a serious argument. Why did we allow Iranian oil back into global markets? Because we needed it. We removed sanctions because without Iranian oil, the global economy could go off a cliff. If the Houthis and the Iranians shut down the Red Sea, you won’t just lose Persian Gulf oil — you’ll lose Red Sea trade as well. That would throttle the world economy. And that’s what could ultimately force the Trump administration to concede.
text_zh: 约翰·米尔斯海默教授谈特朗普的霍尔木兹封锁：这不仅无效，而且适得其反。认为伊朗会简单地举手投降并不是一个严肃的论点。我们为什么要允许伊朗石油重返全球市场？因为我们需要它。我们取消制裁是因为没有伊朗石油，全球经济可能会崩溃。如果胡塞武装和伊朗人切断红海，你不仅会失去波斯湾石油，还会失去红海贸易。那将扼杀世界经济。而这最终可能迫使特朗普政府让步。

text: ↩️ Reply to ResistanceTrench mirror: "🇺🇸⚡️🇮🇷 Trump says IRGC fast attack boats will be “eliminated” if they get anywhere near U.S. blockade." Trump announces victory over his own imagination again
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 ResistanceTrench 镜像：“🇺🇸⚡️🇮🇷 特朗普称，如果伊斯兰革命卫队的快速攻击艇靠近美国封锁线，它们将被‘消灭’。” 特朗普再次宣布战胜了自己的想象力

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Trump says IRGC fast attack boats will be “eliminated” if they get anywhere near U.S. blockade.
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 特朗普称，如果伊斯兰革命卫队的快速攻击艇靠近美国封锁线，它们将被“消灭”。

text: ⚡️ 🇸🇾 🇺🇸 Debris of an advanced US missile believed to have fallen in Swaida. A video showing what is believed to be a sensitive part of a missile belonging to the US THAAD missile defense system in southern Syria, specifically near Swaida. According to a report published, the video likely shows the missile's infrared seeker, one of its most sensitive components. The report indicated that the part appears relatively intact despite the interception or impact conditions. This type of technology is considered highly classified, and US authorities believe that if it falls into enemy hands, it could be used for reverse engineering and developing countermeasures. The US Department of Defense has not issued any official statement. Or confirmation regarding the implementation of a debris recovery operation. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇸🇾 🇺🇸 在苏韦达发现的先进美国导弹残骸。一段视频显示了据信是美国萨德导弹防御系统导弹的一个敏感部件，位于叙利亚南部，具体是在苏韦达附近。根据发布的一份报告，该视频可能显示了导弹的红外导引头，这是其最敏感的组件之一。报告指出，尽管经历了拦截或撞击条件，该部件看起来相对完好。这种技术被认为是高度机密的，美国当局认为，如果它落入敌人手中，可能会被用于逆向工程和开发反制措施。美国国防部尚未发表任何官方声明或确认是否实施了残骸回收行动。@wfwitness

text: Trumps “blockade” of Iran has started
text_zh: 特朗普对伊朗的“封锁”已经开始

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 US President Donald Trump says Iran’s navy is “at the bottom of the sea, completely obliterated – 158 ships.” He warns that any remaining “fast attack ships” approaching a US blockade will be “immediately eliminated,” describing the response as “quick and brutal.” He adds that “98.2% of drugs coming into the US by ocean or sea have stopped,” linking the policy to maritime enforcement. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普称伊朗海军“躺在海底，彻底覆灭——158艘船”。他警告说，任何接近美国封锁线的剩余“快速攻击舰”都将被“立即消灭”，并将这种反应描述为“迅速而残酷”。他补充说，“通过海洋或海路进入美国的毒品有98.2%已经停止”，并将该政策与海上执法联系起来。@wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 "MY BLOCKADE IS BETTER THAN YOURS, POSSIBLY THE BEST EVER. THANK YOU FOR THE ATTENTION TO THIS MATTER" 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 “我的封锁比你的更好，可能是史上最好的。感谢对此事的关注” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Trump: Iran’s Navy is laying at the bottom of the sea, completely obliterated - 158 ships. What we have not hit are their small number of, what they call, “fast attack ships,” because we did not consider them much of a threat. Warning: If any of these ships come anywhere close to our BLOCKADE, they will be immediately ELIMINATED, using the same system of kill that we use against the drug dealers on boats at Sea. It is quick and brutal. P.S. 98.2% of Drugs coming into the U.S. by Ocean or Sea have STOPPED! Thank you for your attention to this matter.
text_zh: 特朗普：伊朗海军正躺在海底，彻底覆灭——158艘船。我们没有打击的是他们为数不多的所谓“快速攻击舰”，因为我们认为它们构不成太大威胁。警告：如果这些船只中的任何一艘胆敢靠近我们的封锁线，它们将被立即消灭，使用我们打击海上毒贩船只的同一套杀戮系统。它既迅速又残酷。附：通过海洋或海路进入美国的毒品有98.2%已经停止！感谢您对此事的关注。

text: 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 ⚡️ War Criminal Bibi: "He (JD Vance) briefed me in detail, as members of this administration do every day, on the progress of the negotiations."
text_zh: 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 战争罪犯比比：“他（JD·万斯）向我详细通报了谈判的进展，正如本届政府成员每天所做的那样。”

text: China denies reports that it is sending or planning to send weapons to Iran: We oppose groundless smears or malicious associations without any factual basis.
text_zh: 中国否认有关其正在或计划向伊朗运送武器的报道：我们反对任何毫无事实根据的无端抹黑或恶意联想。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇶 Iraq’s Shiite Coordination Framework has resumed intensive meetings to name a prime minister candidate. The first gathering is at Ammar al‑Hakim’s house. Out of 12 leaders, eight must sign the official letter to the president for the candidate to be commissioned.…" ⚡️ 🇮🇶 🇺🇸 Kurdistan24 : Iraq’s Shiite religious authority, the Marja’iyya, has reportedly placed a veto on a second term for caretaker Iraqi Prime Minister Mohammed Shia al‑Sudani, a senior Coordination Framework leader said. An “external veto” is also in place. Sudani’s chances are “very low”. Three main candidates are being considered: former prime minister Haider al‑Abadi, Bassem al‑Badri and Hamid al‑Shatri. Nouri al‑Maliki’s prospects are fading, and he may propose an independent candidate. U.S. President Trump has warned that Washington could withdraw support if Maliki returns to office. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇶 伊拉克什叶派协调框架已恢复密集会议，以提名总理候选人。第一次聚会在阿马尔·哈基姆的家中。在12位领导人中，必须有8位签署正式信函给总统，候选人才能获得任命……” ⚡️ 🇮🇶 🇺🇸 Kurdistan24：据一位协调框架高级领导人称，伊拉克什叶派宗教权威——大阿亚图拉（Marja’iyya）据报道否决了看守总理穆罕默德·希亚·苏达尼连任。目前还存在“外部否决”。苏达尼的机会“非常渺茫”。目前正在考虑三名主要候选人：前总理海德尔·阿巴迪、巴塞姆·巴德里和哈米德·沙特里。努里·马利基的前景正在暗淡，他可能会提议一名独立候选人。美国总统特朗普警告说，如果马利基重返办公室，华盛顿可能会撤回支持。@wfwitness

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Drone alert sirens are active in the Golan region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部戈兰地区无人机警报响起。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 The IDF reports two soldiers were moderately injured and six others lightly wounded after an explosive drone struck the area where they were operating in southern Lebanon earlier this Monday. All of the injured were evacuated to hospital for medical treatment, and their families have been notified. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列国防军报告称，本周一早些时候，一架爆炸性无人机击中了他们在黎巴嫩南部行动的区域，导致两名士兵中度受伤，另有六人轻伤。所有伤者均被送往医院接受治疗，其家属已收到通知。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇶 Al-Araby Al-Jadeed: Iraq’s political scene has shifted to a new crisis over the premiership after the election of President Nizar Amidi. The Coordination Framework is deeply divided, with growing momentum to exclude its current nominee Nouri al‑Maliki.…" ⚡️ 🇮🇶 Iraq’s Shiite Coordination Framework has resumed intensive meetings to name a prime minister candidate. The first gathering is at Ammar al‑Hakim’s house. Out of 12 leaders, eight must sign the official letter to the president for the candidate to be commissioned. The constitution allows 14 days to avoid a political vacuum. Any candidate who secures two‑thirds of the framework’s votes will be their nominee. Nouri al‑Maliki has not yet withdrawn; he may condition his withdrawal on a candidate close to him. Other names include Haider al‑Abadi, Bassem al‑Badri, Mohsen al‑Mandlawi, Hamid al‑Shatri, Qasim al‑Araji, Ali Shukri and Muhammad Sahib al‑Daraji. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇶 Al-Araby Al-Jadeed：在尼扎尔·阿米迪总统当选后，伊拉克的政治局势因总理职位陷入了新的危机。协调框架内部分歧严重，排除其现任提名人努里·马利基的呼声日益高涨……” ⚡️ 🇮🇶 伊拉克什叶派协调框架已恢复密集会议，以提名总理候选人。第一次聚会在阿马尔·哈基姆的家中。在12位领导人中，必须有8位签署正式信函给总统，候选人才能获得任命。宪法允许14天的时间以避免政治真空。任何获得框架三分之二选票的候选人将成为他们的提名人。努里·马利基尚未退出；他可能会以一位与他亲近的候选人作为他退出的条件。其他名字包括海德尔·阿巴迪、巴塞姆·巴德里、穆赫辛·曼德拉维、哈米德·沙特里、卡西姆·阿拉吉、阿里·舒克里和穆罕默德·萨希布·达拉吉。@wfwitness
